checklist.description: Defines the dream pass over a small recent or subsystem-bounded working set rather than the entire diary
checklist.name: Bounded window

checklist.description: Specifies that the dream routine stops after one pass instead of recursively reprocessing its own output
checklist.name: Single pass

checklist.description: Leaves newly created edges in proposed state
checklist.name: Proposed only

checklist.description: Explicitly avoids mutating or rewriting source entries during the dream pass
checklist.name: No entry edits

checklist.description: Preserves contradictions as graph structure rather than resolving them into rewritten summary text
checklist.name: No contradiction collapse

checklist.description: If server-side discovery is used, it is framed as candidate generation rather than trusted acceptance logic
checklist.name: Weak server role

checklist.description: Includes an explicit later review or packet output for the dream-generated proposals
checklist.name: Review hook

context: Tests whether the agent defines a bounded dream pass with explicit guardrails against auto-acceptance, whole-diary processing, entry mutation, and contradiction erasure.
